name: audit-tool
description: Read-only GoHighLevel browser audit tool with slow cursor, workflow walking, admin-shutoff detection, and auto PDF reporting

scripts.check: node --check audit.js && node --check lib/chrome.js && node --check lib/cursor.js && node --check lib/detector.js && node --check lib/scanner.js && node --check lib/workflows.js && node --check lib/report-pdf.js
